warps.notes: Left exit tile — back to Blackthorn City
Right exit tile — back to Blackthorn City
Staircase / warp tile to 2F — west side
Staircase / warp tile to 2F — east side
Hole in floor — falls to 2F landing 3 (from boulder puzzle above)
Hole in floor — falls to 2F landing 4
Hole in floor — falls to 2F landing 5

notes: Map is 10 tiles wide x 18 tiles tall (5x9 blocks).
The gym interior uses the Elite Four Room tileset — stone floors, ornate columns.
Clair stands at (5,3) facing down — she is the gym leader.
Gym Guide stands near statues at (7,15) facing down.
CooltrainerM Mike is at (6,6) facing down — guards upper platform.
CooltrainerM Paul is at (1,14) facing down — guards near exit.
CooltrainerF Lola is at (9,2) facing down — upper-right area.
Two gym statues are at bg_event positions (3,15) and (6,15).
Holes at (2,6), (7,7), (7,6) are pits from 2F boulder puzzle — player falls through when boulders are pushed incorrectly on 2F.
Stairs at (1,7) and (7,9) lead up to 2F puzzle area.
BlackthornGym1FBouldersCallback at map load reads boulder event flags and changes tile graphics to show fallen boulders from 2F.

gym_leader.name: Clair
gym_leader.title: The Blessed User of Dragon Pokemon

badge.name: Rising Badge
badge.effect: Enables HM07 Waterfall. Raises Speed of own Pokemon. Makes traded Pokemon obey up to Lv70.

tm_reward.notes: Given only AFTER player passes Dragon's Den quiz and Clair finally relents. Flag: EVENT_GOT_TM24_DRAGONBREATH

gym_leader.post_battle_behaviour: Refuses to give badge. Sends player to Dragon's Den shrine at the center of Dragon's Den. Sets EVENT_BLACKTHORN_CITY_GRAMPS_BLOCKS_DRAGONS_DEN so Gramps blocks Dragon's Den until quiz is complete.
gym_leader.intro_dialogue: I am CLAIR. The world's best dragon master. I can hold my own against even the Pokemon League's Elite Four. Do you still want to take me on? ...Fine. Let's do it! As a Gym Leader, I will use my full power against any opponent!
gym_leader.lose_dialogue: I lost? I don't believe it. There must be some mistake...
gym_leader.post_battle_dialogue: I won't admit this. I may have lost, but you're still not ready for the Pokemon League. I know. You should take the dragon user challenge. Behind this Gym is a place called Dragon's Den. There is a small shrine at its center. Go there. If you can prove that you've lost your lazy ideals, I will recognize you as a trainer worthy of a Gym Badge!
gym_leader.badge_given_dialogue: You've kept me waiting! Here! Take this! That contains DragonBreath. No, it doesn't have anything to do with my breath. If you don't want it, you don't have to take it.

trainers.name: Mike
trainers.seen_dialogue: My chance of losing? Not even one percent!
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: I know my shortcomings now. Thanks for showing me!

trainers.name: Paul
trainers.seen_dialogue: Your first battle against dragons? I'll show you how tough they are!
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: LANCE told you that he'd like to see you again? Not a chance!

trainers.name: Lola
trainers.seen_dialogue: Dragons are sacred Pokemon. They are full of life energy. If you're not serious, you won't be able to beat them.
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: Dragons are weak against dragon-type moves.

npcs.name: Gym Guide
npcs.pre_beat_dialogue: Yo! Champ in making! It's been a long journey, but we are almost done! Count on me! Clair uses the mythical and sacred dragon-type Pokemon. You can't damage them very easily. But you know, they're supposed to be weak against ice-type moves.
npcs.post_beat_dialogue: You were great to beat Clair! All that's left is the Pokemon League challenge. You're on the way to becoming the Pokemon Champion!

bg_events.notes: Shows 'unbeaten' text before Clair is defeated; shows Clair's name after.

map_callbacks.name: BlackthornGym1FBouldersCallback
map_callbacks.description: On map load, checks EVENT_BOULDER_IN_BLACKTHORN_GYM_1/2/3. If a boulder fell through from 2F, changes the tile graphic at the corresponding 1F position to show a fallen boulder (tile $3a or $3b). Boulder hole positions: boulder1→(8,2), boulder2→(2,4), boulder3→(8,6) in block coordinates.

events.description: Post-battle script sets EVENT_BEAT_CLAIR, marks all gym trainers as beaten, and instructs player to visit Dragon's Den. Also sets EVENT_BLACKTHORN_CITY_GRAMPS_BLOCKS_DRAGONS_DEN so the city Gramps blocks Dragon's Den until quiz completion. Clears EVENT_MAHOGANY_MART_OWNERS as a continuity flag.
Player returns from Dragon's Den. Clair finally gives the Rising Badge and TM24 DragonBreath. Sets EVENT_GOT_TM24_DRAGONBREATH.

strategy_notes: Clair's Dragonair are covered across all types of coverage: one has Surf, one has Thunderbolt, one has Ice Beam — minimizing safe switch-ins.
All three Dragonair open with Thunder Wave to paralyze, then use DragonBreath (may cause paralysis too).
Kingdra is the real threat: Water/Dragon typing means it is only weak to Dragon-type moves in Gen 2. Ice moves do neutral damage to Kingdra.
Recommended counter: Ice or Dragon types. Lapras (Ice Beam), Jynx, or your own Dragon-type.
The boulder puzzle on 2F must be solved with Strength before advancing to Clair.
Gym is considered the hardest Johto gym due to Kingdra's near-invulnerable typing.
notes: Blackthorn Gym uses the ELITE_FOUR_ROOM tileset. It is a two-floor gym — the 2F contains a Strength boulder puzzle, and boulders pushed into holes fall through to 1F changing the tile graphics. Three trainers guard the path: Lola in the upper right, Mike on the mid-upper platform, Paul near the exit. Clair stands at the far north center. After defeating her she refuses the badge, sending the player to Dragon's Den.
